name: Config__validate_api_keys_raises_for_missing_provider_key
description: Security test verifying Config._validate_api_keys raises ValueError when MODEL_PROVIDER is set to a provider (e.g., 'azure') but the corresponding API key (AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY) is missing or empty.
input: Temporarily set Config.MODEL_PROVIDER='azure' and ensure Config.AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY is '' or not set, then call Config._validate_api_keys().
output: A ValueError is raised indicating the missing API key for provider 'azure'.
success_criteria: exception message mentions the provider name 'azure' or 'API key'
no other unexpected exception types are raised
error_scenarios: Test environment has AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY set (test must isolate environment variables)
Config attributes overridden elsewhere in test causing different behavior
